description: Designing CAD models for the Open Parametric Hand project. Working on 3D design and rapid prototyping to improve modular robotic hands.
Built a multi-channel infusion system for an ex vivo heart revival platform. Developed the firmware in C and designed the PCB and circuit routing.
Worked on building an automatic blood smear device for screening sickle cell anemia. Handled the embedded control stack and motor control.
Studying core electronics subjects and focusing on embedded systems, control systems, and hardware-software integration.
